description_long: This is a medium-sized upholstered couch with a whimsical aquatic-themed fabric featuring dolphins, fish, and bubbles on a blue background. The couch has a high, continuous backrest and rounded, padded armrests that extend to the front. The seat appears to be a pull-out or convertible design, as seen from the partially extended seat platform in one view. The legs are short, dark, and minimally visible, likely made of metal or plastic, providing subtle elevation. The upholstery is smooth and tightly fitted, with no visible tufting or accent pillows. The overall form is soft and inviting, with gentle curves and a playful, decorative pattern.
description: A blue upholstered couch with a dolphin and aquatic motif, featuring rounded armrests and a convertible seat platform.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the continuous high backrest and the full aquatic-themed upholstery pattern.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the rounded armrest and the smooth, padded profile of the couch.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the partially extended seat platform and the main seating area with the playful dolphin pattern.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the armrest and the overall depth of the couch.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Integrated seat and back cushions, both continuous and attached, with no visible accent or throw pillows.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Patterned upholstery featuring dolphins, fish, and bubbles on a blue background, with a smooth, non-tufted finish.
attribute_leg_style: Short, dark, minimally visible legs, likely metal or plastic, with a simple cylindrical or block shape.
attribute_armrest_design: Rounded, padded armrests at standard height, fully upholstered in the same patterned fabric as the rest of the couch.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous, and cushioned backrest, fully attached and smoothly upholstered without tufting or division.
